titleStmt.title: SII 38.149: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 149. (A.R. No. 149 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: A pillar of the verandah, round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājakēsarivarman alias uḍaiya Śrī-[Vijaya]rājēndradēva ie. Rājādhirāja (I) Year 3[3]: 1051 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. Contains a portion of the mēykīrtti of the ruler. It records that the shepherds of the temple of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻalkōṭṭam, who were residing in the locality Tribhuvanasundara-chēri, received ninety two sheep from Rājarājaṉ alias Sundarachōḻa-pāṇḍya Viḻupparaiyaṉ, a servant (paṇimagaṉ), (a native) of Kāñchīpuram in Eyil-nāḍu in Eyil-kōṭṭam and agreed to supply ninety nāḻi of oil annually for burning a perpetual lamp (to the god of the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
damaged
velai keḻa kān=taḷurccālai kalamaṟuppitta
ṉayuṅ kaṉṉakucciyamākali valvaṉ
ṇṭamaiyil
vaccira neṭuvāḷ viccaiyaṉ
lāṅkavaṉ pitāvai mātāvai van catā
paṭutta paṭai māhavamallaṉ payat
ṭum Oṟṟarai veruvara piṭittu Āṅkavar mārvil Ākavamallaṉ yāṅkaḷ
nāmañ nāṉṉaṉa Eḻuti celutti taṉpulik koṭip paṭaiñaṉ
ṇṭi nuḷ O Āṅkavar Ettakiriyilloṅki kalluḻuvaiyṟeḻuti Uyarjaya
ttamam Eḻil peṟa niṟutti n=taṉ kaḻal paṇintoḻukum Araicarkaḷo
ṭu ceṉṟāṭi porupuli virarkoṭiyoṭu tiyākakoṭiyoṭu yoṭuttoṉnalar kava
toṉneti piṟakkam Iravalār norkin=tavilil vaṉ taṇṭat
lines are damaged
ṅkaḻalṭalākat taṉ mutalinarum ttaiyva pariyoṭum kariyoṭum paṭṭuporutu vicai
yarājentraraneṉṟokki vira Apiṣekam viceya ṅku
maṉuneṟi niṉṟu [ha]savametam ceytu Araicuviṟṟiru
muṉ Uyarn=ta perumpukaḻ kovirājakecaripammarāṉa Uṭaiyār I jarājen=tira de
varkku yāṇṭu 30 Āvatu puḻalkoṭṭattup puḻalnāṭṭut tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyār ti
ru viḷakkāṭṭukkuṭi tiripuvaṉa[ cun=tara] cceri maṉṟāṭi tirumāl puṉṉaiyum murttiyyanaṭi
yum cūṟṟi tirumaṇiyum pottaṉ kaṇṇum kiḷaiyaṉ paṇpaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ū
rom paṇimakaṉ Eyiṟkoṭṭattu Eyil nāṭṭu kāñciypurattu cca
ṉ rājarājaṉnāṉa cun=taracoḻapāṇṭiya viḻupparaiyaṉum tiruvoṟṟi
yur Uṭaiyārkku can=tirātittavarai vaitta tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku vait
ta cāvāmuvāpperāṭu toṇṇūṟṟuiraṇṭu Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟṟu Iraṇṭum koṇ
ṭu tirunantā viḷakku Oṉṟukku Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻiyum Ā
canti[rā*titta]vaṟ Aḷappomānom tirumāl puṉṉaiyum murtti Aiyyanaṭiyum cūṟ
ṟi tirumaṇiyum pottaṉ karaṉṟum kiḷaiyaṉ paṇ
Digital edition of SII 38.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
